race.comment: SUBTERRAIN (5) has gone bang-bang since joining the new stable and looks the runner in this line-up with the most upside. Successful rider Thompson stays in the stirrups and can easily bring up the hat-trick against this lot. ARATIRI (8) loves this track and trip with three wins and two placings from just five attempts and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Has to be included in calculations. EASY LOVE (2) got the job done here when resuming and should appreciate the step-up in trip now. Top-three aspirations. The well-related MILES OF GLORY (14) (half to 2xG3 winner and 3xG1 placed Growing Empire) brings NSW formlines to the table and any market support must be noted.
